programName: Citizens Lead Service Line Replacement Program
geography: Citizens Energy Group water service territory
subsidyType: multi-year replacement program that fully replaces customer-owned lead service lines through utility projects and targeted neighborhoods
publicSideCovered: yes Citizens funds the public right-of-way portion of full replacement
privateSideCovered: yes proactive neighborhood replacements occur at no additional cost and owner-initiated paths vary by location
propertyRules: eligibility depends on current project areas right-of-entry approval or owner-initiated replacement choice
contractorRules: Citizens contractors or approved plumbers complete the work depending on the replacement path
